channel.title: Getting Started on EWW | ITandTEL Cloud Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Getting Started on EWW | ITandTEL Cloud Docs

item.title: Account
item.description:
On this page, you can find an explanation of how to create and manage a new user account in the Cloud Console.

Table of contents

  • Table of contents
    • Registration
    • Manage account
      • Edit account
      • Change password
      • Set authenticator
      • Find all sessions
      • Login and Logout

Registration

To start work in the Cloud Console, firstly, you need to register a new user account. For this, please, contact to the Cloud Support.

Currently, we’ve closed ability for public registration. However, if you are already a registered user with an active Organization, you can register new users and add them as Administrators.
Please, contact to the Cloud Support, and we will help you to create an account.

item.title: Organizations
item.description:
On this page, you can find an explanation of how to create a new Organization and how to manage it in the Cloud Console.

Table of contents

  • Table of contents
    • Users within Organization
    • Organizations page
    • Create Organization
    • Edit Organization
    • Delete Organization
    • Leave Organization
    • Add Administrators
    • Transfer an Organization

Users within Organization

In the Cloud Console, Organization Users can have different roles depending on their access level. 🔹 Resource Access Roles The following roles define access to Organization resources and its Projects:

item.title: Billing
item.description:
On this page, you can find an explanation of how to use Billing Section in the Cloud Console.

Table of contents

  • Table of contents
    • User Billing page
      • Generate Consolidated Billing Report
      • Update Billing Administrators list
    • Organization Billing Overview Page
    • Project Billing Overview Page
      • Generate Detailed Billing Report
      • Set Budget Threshold

User Billing page

The Billing section displays only Organizations where the User has the owner or billing administrator role. More detailed information about User roles within an Organization can be found here - Users within Organization.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
On this page, you can find an explanation of how to create a new Project, and how to manage them in the Cloud Console.

Table of contents

  • Table of contents
    • Projects page
    • Create Project
    • Project Overview Page
    • Edit Project
    • Delete Project
    • Add users to Project

Projects page

To see information about Projects of the Organization and to manage them, you can only if your User Role in this Organization is an Administrator or Owner.
